title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer - Full stack

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer with 5+ years building end-to-end data and backend solutions for customers using Python, Scala, TypeScript, JavaScript, and Apache Spark. Skilled in big data pipelines, ML/AI models, Databricks, and CI/CD across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Delivered technical solutions that improved processing efficiency by 35% and cut issue resolution time by 40%.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Architected scalable backend solutions using Python and Java Spring Boot microservices, enabling modular service-oriented architecture and independent deployments for 10+ customer-facing services.
Engineered Python and Apache Spark big data pipelines processing millions of records, reducing manual operational effort by ~50% and improving processing efficiency.
Built ML/AI models and AI-powered backend services integrating Python-based LLM APIs for intelligent text processing, classification, and automated workflows.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Engineered high-throughput event-driven systems with DynamoDB Streams, Python/Node.js Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability for customers.
Built responsive Angular and Bootstrap single-page applications using TypeScript, JavaScript, and RxJS, delivering technical product solutions to end users.
Deployed cloud-native applications across AWS (Lambda, ECS, EC2, S3, RDS) and Azure with CI/CD, reducing production issue resolution time by 40% via Splunk observability.
Led architecture and design decisions for end-to-end customer projects, translating business needs into technical solutions with measurable impact.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend applications using Python, Scala, Java Spring Boot, and Node.js, delivering scalable RESTful APIs and microservices for customer products.
Built Python and Spark data engineering scripts for data transformation, validation, and backend task orchestration, processing large big data workloads.
Optimized SQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35% and supporting Excel-based reporting for stakeholders.
Built dynamic frontend applications using Angular, TypeScript, JavaScript, SCSS, and Bootstrap, plus reusable components for complex UI workflows.
Authored technical documentation and writing for RESTful APIs using Swagger/OpenAPI, enforcing API versioning and backward compatibility.
Implemented event-driven architecture with Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35% across customer-facing solutions.
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform on AWS and GCP, containerizing applications via Docker and Kubernetes to improve CI/CD deployment efficiency by ~40%.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular, Bootstrap, and Python/Java backend services, addressing real customer needs.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational database schemas for transactional systems, improving query execution time by 20%.
Built Angular frontend modules using TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, and Reactive Forms with strong design decisions for usability.
Delivered RESTful APIs and documented service contracts using Swagger/OpenAPI, supporting technical onboarding and training for new developers.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python-based test automation tools within a CI/CD pipeline.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University of North Carolina at Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering

changes: Reconstructed fragmented job entries into 3 clean roles (Vanguard Software Engineer, Xebia Associate Software Engineer, Xebia Engineer Trainee) with proper titles, companies, and dates preserved.
Added a Senior Forward Deployed Engineer summary mirroring the exact target title with key required skills and quantified outcomes.

Wove required keywords into experience bullets: Apache Spark, Scala, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Bootstrap, data engineering, big data, ML/AI models, CI/CD, Excel, AWS, Azure, GCP, technical writing, training, customers, architecture/design decisions, end-to-end solutions, product needs, impact.
Converted all fragments into strong action-verb bullets (Architected, Engineered, Optimized, Led) and removed weak openers.
Reordered Skills to lead with job-required skills and de-duplicated; removed stray 'Frontend: Angular' entry.
Cleaned education to a single valid degree with institution, and standardized certification names.

ESTIMATED METRICS TO CONFIRM: ~50% manual-effort reduction, 'millions of records' Spark volume, '10+ customer-facing services', and ~40% CI/CD deployment efficiency gain — please verify these reflect actual figures.
